assertions.reason: All 8 targeted loading-overlay files use bg-background/50, and none of those files contain bg-white/50.
evidence: bg-white/50 search returned no matches in each targeted file.

Repo-wide bg-white/50 matches are limited to out-of-scope files: apps/remix/app/components/dialogs/template-direct-link-dialog.tsx:283, apps/remix/app/components/general/skeletons/document-edit-skeleton.tsx:24, apps/remix/app/components/general/pdf-viewer/pdf-viewer-states.tsx:15.

assertions.reason: The targeted sign-in and sign-up card containers use bg-muted, and none of the targeted files contain bg-neutral-100.
evidence: bg-neutral-100 search returned no matches in each targeted file.
Repo-wide bg-neutral-100 matches are limited to out-of-scope files: apps/remix/app/components/general/user-profile-skeleton.tsx:24 and apps/remix/app/components/general/user-profile-timur.tsx:21.

assertions.reason: The public profile templates table uses divide-border and border-border, with no remaining legacy neutral-border classes in the file.
evidence: Search for divide-neutral-200|border-neutral-200|dark:divide-foreground/30|dark:border-foreground/30 returned no matches in apps/remix/app/components/tables/settings-public-profile-templates-table.tsx.

frictions.description: The validation contract's illustrative list of remaining bg-white/50 files was not exhaustive/current: the actual repo-wide out-of-scope match was pdf-viewer-states.tsx rather than document-dropzone.tsx.
frictions.resolution: Used repo-wide grep results to distinguish targeted files from out-of-scope files before marking VAL-SURFACE-001 as pass.
